problem id: 3779ab78
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) XOR SHL(5)

examples:
  10110101 -> 00001101
  01100000 -> 00000011
  01110111 -> 01011011
  01000000 -> 00000010
  11001100 -> 11100110
  01101010 -> 00010011
  01011101 -> 01001010
  10101010 -> 00010101
  00000110 -> 11110000
  01111110 -> 00110011

query: 11001010
predicted answer: 00010110
